calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Terminating Trust
Off Calendar Aug-04-2014 Off Calendar

Petition For Order Terminating Trust
Off Calendar Jul-07-2014 Continued To Aug-04-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Terminating Trust
Off Calendar Jun-16-2014 Continued To Jul-07-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gary Rothstein for Bank of America.

The Court inquired why the petition was filed in San Francisco. Mr. Rothstein presented argument to support his position noting that Bank of America is here and this is the place of administration. The Court noted that Bank of America is everywhere and inquired why a court order was necessary. Mr. Rothstein stated that the trustee can't go forward without the Court's blessing. The Court addressed venue and the out of county property noting that it still isn't sure that a court order is necessary. Mr. Rothstein presented additional argument in support of venue and stated that he would need additional time to inquire whether the court needs the assignments. The Court continued the matter to July 7, 2014 at 9:00 am in Department 220 for counsel to address any remaining issues and at minimum the assignment issue.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition For Order Terminating Trust
